symptom_vector: high memory usage, memory saturation, memory exhaustion with connection refused errors and latency spikes

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: currencyservice 组件因内存压力(pod_memory_working_set_bytes异常)导致服务不可用，引发连接拒绝和延迟飙升
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 aiops-k8s-05 节点的 node_memory_usage_rate 从29.68%上升到42.25%(34.93%增长)，该节点上运行着 currencyservice-0
Step 2: 分析 currencyservice-0 的 pod_processes 指标从1.0变为2.0，同时rrt_max从5037飙升至65873(171.59%增长)，表明可能存在因内存压力导致的进程重启和性能退化
Step 3: 日志中发现多个frontend实例报告连接currencyservice端口7000被拒绝，错误信息为'connect: connection refused'，确认currencyservice服务不可用

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 持续高值或快速上升趋势
critical_checks.instruction: 检查currencyservice相关pod的内存工作集字节数是否异常升高

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 数值从1.0变为2.0，表示进程重启
critical_checks.instruction: 检查currencyservice pod的进程数是否发生变化，可能指示内存压力导致重启

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 包含'connect: connection refused'错误信息
critical_checks.instruction: 在frontend和currencyservice日志中搜索connection refused相关错误
检查currencyservice日志中是否有模块加载失败记录

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 包含'Error while dialing'的GRPC连接错误
critical_checks.instruction: 搜索GRPC拨号失败相关的错误日志
查找服务状态为unavailable的日志记录
